ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource for which to create or update the resource policy.
ResourceArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource for which to create or update the resource policy.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 20  
Maximum Length: 1011  
Pattern: ^arn:[a-z0-9-]+:bedrock-agentcore:[a-z0-9-]*:[0-9]{12}:.+$  
Update requires: Replacement

Policy.description: The resource policy to create or update.
Policy.markdownDescription:
The resource policy to create or update.

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 20480  
Update requires: No interruption
